_readme: Each entry needs a 'platform' (greenhouse/lever/ashby) and the exact board 'token'/slug. Tokens below are STARTER GUESSES for well-known companies -- verify each one before relying on it (see instructions below), since tokens change and not every company listed is confirmed live. To verify: open the URL pattern shown in that source file (e.g. scraper/sources/greenhouse.py) with the token filled in, in your browser. If you get job JSON back, it's correct. If you get an error, search '<company name> careers greenhouse' or check their careers page footer/source for the real link. Add/remove entries freely -- this file drives both the source list AND the 'good company' ranking boost.
